name: Specialized Transport
recent_news: No web presence found; phone 704-482-0703 not tied to any documented school-bus or NEMT operator. A FMCSA entity named 'Specialized Transport LLC' exists but is a Houston TX property carrier (USDOT 3673111), not the NC entity. NC company likely a micro/single-vehicle special-needs van operator with no online footprint.
fit_notes: Not a viable Summit tuck-in: 5 employees, ~$276K revenue, no verifiable school-district contract footprint or fleet. Sub-scale even by tuck-in standards.

name: A Unity Transportation 2 LLC
recent_news: Registered with NPI database Feb 2020 as a non-emergency medical transport (van) provider in Memphis, TN at 6972 Appling Farms Pkwy. Active Facebook page but listing on SupportBlackOwned is inactive. No evidence of school district contracts or yellow school-bus operations.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in: this is an NEMT van service, not a school-bus contractor. Wrong service line and far below tuck-in size threshold.

name: M & M Corporate Trnsp LLC
recent_news: No web presence located; residential-style address (2111 Wooden Heart Ct, Memphis 38116) suggests home-based micro-operator. No FMCSA passenger authority or school-district contracts surfaced. Distinct from M&A Transportation Inc. (FedEx linehaul) and M&M Trucking LLC (auto transport) which are unrelated Memphis entities.
fit_notes: Not a viable Summit tuck-in: 4 employees, ~$276K revenue, home address, no school-bus footprint. Skip.

name: Accent Limousine Svc
recent_news: Operates in Killeen TX area; listed across limo directories (Yelp, Yellow Pages, rstyles) as a party/limousine service. Address on FM 2484 likely owner residence; another listing shows 4217 East Veterans Memorial Blvd as service address. No evidence of school district routes; Killeen ISD self-operates and contracts are not held by Accent.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in: limousine/party-bus operator, not a school-bus or SPED contractor. Wrong vertical and sub-scale.

name: West Coast Limousine Svc
recent_news: Roy Pollock's LinkedIn confirms affiliation with 'West Coast Transportation' in the Aptos/Santa Cruz area. Listings position the company as airport/limo black-car service for Aptos-area travelers; distinct from West Coast Chauffeur & Transportation (Temecula, CA, female-owned by Katherine Artiglio) and from westcoastlimousine.com (San Jose). No evidence of school-district route contracts or yellow school-bus operations.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in: limousine/black-car operator focused on airport runs, not a K-12 home-to-school or SPED contractor. Wrong service line; skip.
